title: Small Claims Court (Limit of Jurisdiction) (Liquidated Claims) Rules, 2023

sections.heading: These Rules may be cited as the Small Claims Court (Limit Title
A small claims court has jurisdiction in an action, whether Limit of
sections.text:
arising from contract or tort, or from both, where the value of the jurisdiction
property, debt or damages claimed as a balance of accounts or
otherwise is not more than seventy-five thousand Kwacha.

sections.heading: The Small Claims Court (Limit of Jurisdiction) (Liquidated Revocation
sections.text:
Claims) Rules, 2009 are revoked. of S.I. No.30
of 2009
DR M. MALILA,
LUSAKA Chief Justice
30th June, 2023
[RHC.1/4]
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
